Defines and registers protocol numbers and handlers for PULSE frames in the firmware.

# Purpose
This code is a header file that defines protocol numbers and registers protocol handlers for PULSE frames. It uses preprocessor directives to ensure that protocol numbers are defined only once, with constants such as `PULSE_PROTOCOL_LLC`, `PULSE_PROTOCOL_FLASH_IMAGING`, `PULSE_PROTOCOL_LOGGING`, and `PULSE_PROTOCOL_PROMPT`. The `REGISTER_PROTOCOL` macro is used to associate each protocol number with a corresponding handler function, which must have the signature `void handler_function(void *packet, size_t length)`. The file also includes conditional compilation to control the registration of certain protocols based on the `PULSE_EVERYWHERE` macro. This setup facilitates the handling of different PULSE frame protocols by automatically generating function signatures in an associated header file, `pulse_protocol_impl.h`.
